arts.ttl: Milik Returns to Poland for Treatment: Latest on His Juventus Comeback
arts.sum: Arkadiusz Milik's injury woes continue to plague Juventus as the Polish striker has now returned to his homeland for further rehabilitation. The 30-year-old forward, who has yet to make an appearance for the Bianconeri this season, is no longer in Turin as he continues his recovery process. The post Milik Returns to Poland for Treatment: Latest on His Juventus Comeback appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Kean’s Fiorentina Resurgence Leaves Juventus with Regrets
arts.sum: Moise Kean's golden run of form continues to impress as he notched another remarkable performance, scoring a brace against Inter Milan to bring his season tally to 15 goals in 22 league appearances (19 in all competitions). This achievement sets a new personal record for the 24-year-old Italian striker in Europe's top five leagues, surpassing his previous best of 13 goals with PSG in Ligue 1 during the 2020/21 season. The post Kean’s Fiorentina Resurgence Leaves Juventus with Regrets appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Newcastle defender Kelly joins Juventus on loan
arts.sum: Newcastle United defender Lloyd Kelly joins Juventus in a loan deal with an obligation to make the move permanent for £20m in the summer.

arts.ttl: Juventus Convinced by Kolo Muani: Considering Permanent Transfer from Paris Saint-Germain
